title: The South Bird Hunt
description: The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene centers on Zoro, Masira, Shojo, Bellamy, Luffy. The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He was executed later that day,

summary: The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.
